# Architecture

## File Tree

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/export.py` | Export phase: stitch images and write consolidated memorial_cards.json. |
| `src/extraction/__init__.py` | Extraction pipeline for memorial card digitization. |
| `src/extraction/date_verification.py` | Verify OCR-read year digits by visual cross-check with an LLM backend. |
| `src/extraction/interpretation.py` | LLM-based interpretation of OCR text into structured biographical data. |
| `src/extraction/llm.py` | LLM backend abstraction for the extraction pipeline. |
| `src/extraction/ocr.py` | Tesseract OCR text extraction from scanned images. |
| `src/extraction/pipeline.py` | Orchestrates the full extraction pipeline for a single card pair. |
| `src/extraction/schema.py` | Shared constants and JSON schema for the extraction pipeline. |
| `src/images/__init__.py` | Image pairing and stitching for memorial card scans. |
| `src/images/pairing.py` | Fuzzy filename matching for front/back image pairs. |
| `src/images/stitching.py` | Stitch front/back image pairs side-by-side. |
| `src/naming.py` | Derive canonical filenames from extracted card data. |
| `src/review/__init__.py` | Card data management for the review workflow. |
| `src/review/cards.py` | Card data loading, saving, and listing for the review workflow. |
| `src/web/__init__.py` | Web server for the memorial card digitizer. |
| `src/web/match_state.py` | In-memory state management for the match phase. |
| `src/web/server.py` | HTTP server for the memorial card web application. |
| `src/web/worker.py` | Background extraction worker using async two-stage pipeline. |

## Package Exports

- **extraction**: `extract_one`, `ExtractionResult`, `make_backend`, `LLMBackend`, `PERSON_SCHEMA`
  - Extraction pipeline for memorial card digitization.
- **images**: `scan_and_match`, `stitch_pair`
  - Image pairing and stitching for memorial card scans.
- **review**: `list_cards`, `load_card`, `save_card`
  - Card data management for the review workflow.
- **web**: `make_server`
  - Web server for the memorial card digitizer.

## Standalone Modules

- **`src/export.py`**: Export phase: stitch images and write consolidated memorial_cards.json.
- **`src/naming.py`**: Derive canonical filenames from extracted card data.

## HTTP API Endpoints

| Method | Path |
|--------|------|
| GET | `/` |
| GET | `/static/:id` |
| GET | `/api/cards` |
| GET | `/api/cards/:id` |
| GET | `/images/:id` |
| GET | `/output-images/:id` |
| GET | `/api/match/scan` |
| GET | `/api/match/state` |
| GET | `/api/extract/status` |
| GET | `/api/extract/cards` |
| GET | `/api/export/count` |
| PUT | `/api/cards/:id` |
| POST | `/api/match/confirm` |
| POST | `/api/match/confirm-all` |
| POST | `/api/match/unmatch` |
| POST | `/api/match/pair` |
| POST | `/api/match/single` |
| POST | `/api/match/swap` |
| POST | `/api/match/scores` |
| POST | `/api/extract` |
| POST | `/api/extract/cancel` |
| POST | `/api/export` |
